name: KEY TRONIC CORP
summary: Key Tronic Corporation is a contract manufacturer providing integrated electronic and mechanical engineering, precision plastic molding, sheet metal fabrication, printed circuit board assembly, component sourcing, worldwide logistics, and product testing. Originally founded as a computer keyboard manufacturer, the company now serves OEM customers across multiple industries from facilities in the United States, Mexico, China, and Vietnam, differentiating itself through vertical integration and design engineering support.
